top_signals.title: Bitcoin doesn't need Ethereum-style yield, says Strategy's Michael Saylor
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor says Bitcoin does not need staking or inflation, outlining a five-layer “Digital Asset Stack” that generates returns through credit and equity products built around BTC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Turkey Seeks Higher Oil Flows Via Iraq Pipeline to Renew Deal
top_signals.summary: Turkey is seeking higher oil flows through a crucial pipeline that runs through its territory from northern Iraq in order to renew a contract that expires in a little over a month, according to a Turkish official with direct knowledge of the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Daily News 15 / 06 / 2026
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Daily news Brussels, 15 Jun 2026 EU provides cyber support to Ukraine against major attacks
Ukraine can now activate emergency EU cyber support to respond to large-scale cybersecurity incidents...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The human brain is not a machine
top_signals.summary: This common comparison invites us to see ourselves as sub-optimal alternatives to AI agents
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
